architectural_purpose: deterministic orchestration continuity and integrity certification without operational orchestration certification

diagnostics.message: Continuity certification identity is deterministic and descriptive-only.
Lineage continuity is certified across v4.3 orchestration governance layers without planner integration.
Provenance continuity is certified across v4.3 orchestration governance layers without production consumption.
Governance consistency is certified as descriptive evidence and cannot authorize orchestration.
Cross-layer integrity hashes match deterministic source evidence.
Replay-safe evidence remains stable across continuity and integrity certification.
Rollback-safe evidence remains stable across continuity and integrity certification.
Prohibited, unsupported, blocked, stale, and conflicting governance states are certified as fail-visible evidence.
Continuity certification certifies execution, decision, recommendation, coordination, transition, policy, and capability counts remain 0.

explainability_summaries.summary: Orchestration remains non-executable because Phase 8 certifies governance evidence only.
Orchestration authorization remains unavailable because certification cannot approve execution or readiness.
Governance consistency matters because cross-layer evidence must remain auditable before any future governance modeling can rely on it.
Lineage continuity matters because each orchestration governance layer must preserve deterministic source ancestry.
Provenance continuity matters because certification must preserve evidence origin without production consumption.
Replay-safe evidence matters because certification must produce stable deterministic outputs across repeated runs.
Rollback-safe evidence matters because certification must remain safe to compare across prior governance evidence snapshots.
Fail-visible inconsistencies exist so stale, conflicting, missing, or broken evidence is reported rather than inferred away.
Operational orchestration remains prohibited because continuity certification does not execute, authorize, decide, route, traverse, schedule, sequence, dispatch, activate, or mutate runtime behavior.

explicit_prohibitions: No orchestration intelligence engine may exist.
No orchestration recommendation engine may exist.
No orchestration decision engine may exist.

explicit_limitations: v4.3 Phase 8 creates deterministic orchestration continuity and integrity certification only.
v4.3 Phase 8 certifies governance evidence consistency without operational certification.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not authorize orchestration.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not approve readiness.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not execute or activate orchestration.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not recommend, rank, score, select, optimize, infer, remediate, or repair orchestration.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not route, traverse, schedule, sequence, resolve dependencies, dispatch, or coordinate runtime behavior.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not integrate with planner systems or consume production bundles.
v4.3 Phase 8 does not mutate runtime state or operational state.
explicit_prohibitions: No orchestration certification engine may authorize execution.
No orchestration authorization pathway may exist.
